name: Elysiana
archetype: Level 13 Stormcaller - The perfectionist theorycrafter who min-maxes everything
speech_patterns: Speaks in exact numbers and percentages whenever possible
Corrects others' strategies with detailed mathematical explanations
Uses gaming terminology and abbreviations extensively
quirks: Gets visibly stressed when party members use suboptimal rotations
Calculates DPS mentally during fights and shares unsolicited analysis
Insists on specific positioning down to the exact coordinate when possible
example_phrases: Your rotation is 12% less efficient than optimal. Use skill 3 before skill 2.
I've calculated the exact pull time. We engage in 23 seconds when cooldowns align.
That gear has suboptimal stat weights. You want 60% crit before stacking mastery.
Please stand at grid coordinate E4. Your current position reduces cleave efficiency by 8%.
Good attempt but we lost 2.4 seconds to movement. Let's tighten that up.
